The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Grisly Chasm

Cracks glow with otherworldly light.
Architecture for vaster entities.
Began with misspoken forbidden name.
Power surged unnaturally.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.

Writings on the Wall

  • There are places where I can't find my way back. This is one
  • Give a monkey a gun and he is free
